query:
CREATE TABLE `blogPosts` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`titleEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`titleAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`contentEn` text,
	`contentAr` text,
	`excerptEn` text,
	`excerptAr` text,
	`featuredImageUrl` text,
	`category` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'article',
	`authorId` int,
	`isPublished` boolean DEFAULT false,
	`publishedAt` timestamp,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `blogPosts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `blogPosts_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `brands` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`logoUrl` text,
	`order` int DEFAULT 0,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `brands_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `brands_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `contactSubmissions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`firstName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`lastName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`company` varchar(255),
	`subject` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`message` text NOT NULL,
	`language` varchar(10) DEFAULT 'en',
	`status` enum('new','read','responded','archived') DEFAULT 'new',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `contactSubmissions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `locations` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`country` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`city` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`address` text,
	`phone` varchar(20),
	`email` varchar(320),
	`latitude` decimal(10,8),
	`longitude` decimal(11,8),
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `locations_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `markets` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`imageUrl` text,
	`order` int DEFAULT 0,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `markets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `markets_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `productCategories` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`order` int DEFAULT 0,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `productCategories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `productCategories_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `products` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`nameEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`nameAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`descriptionEn` text,
	`descriptionAr` text,
	`categoryId` int,
	`brandId` int,
	`imageUrl` text,
	`specifications` json,
	`order` int DEFAULT 0,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `products_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `products_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `siteSettings` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`key` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`value` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `siteSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `siteSettings_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`)
);
CREATE TABLE `statistics` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`labelEn` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`labelAr` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`value` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`unit` varchar(50),
	`description` text,
	`order` int DEFAULT 0,
	`isActive` boolean DEFAULT true,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `statistics_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
